question: What US city had the highest average percentages of adults age 18 and older who were obese, after accounting for differences in age, in 2014 and 2016? Also, can you find me the person who founded a company sold to JP Morgan to create the corporation that founded this city. Then derive the city this person is based in and report the average expenditure for the city's Police Bureau in 2017 and 2018? Please return only the average expenditure rounded to the nearest integer. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/500-cities-local-data-for-better-health-2016-release/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

result = df[
    (df["Year"] == 2014)
    & (df["GeographicLevel"] == "City")
    & (df["Measure"] == "Obesity among adults aged >=18 Years")
    & (df["Data_Value_Type"] == "Age-adjusted prevalence")
][["StateDesc", "CityName", "Data_Value"]].sort_values(["Data_Value", "StateDesc", "CityName"], ascending=[False, True, True]).reset_index(drop=True)

answer = {
    f"{row.CityName}, {row.StateDesc}": float(row.Data_Value)
    for row in result.itertuples(index=False)
}
1.subquestion: What are the city-level percentages of adults age 18 and older who were obese, after accounting for differences in age, in 2014?

result = df[
    (df["Year"] == 2016)
    & (df["GeographicLevel"] == "City")
    & (df["Measure"] == "Obesity among adults aged >=18 Years")
    & (df["Data_Value_Type"] == "Age-adjusted prevalence")
][["StateDesc", "CityName", "Data_Value"]].sort_values(["Data_Value", "StateDesc", "CityName"], ascending=[False, True, True]).reset_index(drop=True)

answer = {

3.fact: Gary, Indiana, was founded in 1906 by the U.S. Steel corporation as the home for its new plant, Gary Works.

4.fact: In 1901, J. P. Morgan created U.S. Steel by merging Carnegie Steel, Federal Steel, and National Steel
4.subquestion: Which company did J. P. Morgan merge with Federal Steel and National Steel to create <node 3 answer>?

5.fact: Carnegie Steel Company was a steel-producing company primarily created by Andrew Carnegie

6.fact: He immigrated to what is now Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, with his parents in 1848
6.subquestion: Which city was <node 5 answer> based in?

7.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/2011-2023-city-of-pittsburgh-operating-budget/files/2017-operating.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

answer = round(float(df[
    (df["Year"] == 2017)
    & (df["Type"] == "Expenditure")
    & (df["Department"] == "PS - POLICE BUREAU")
]["Amount"].sum()), 2)
7.subquestion: What is the total 2017 expenditure for the Police Bureau of <node 6 answer>?
